name: Remove Wiki Generation Mode Toggle
description: Records the proposed decision to remove the concise/comprehensive wiki generation mode toggle and default to comprehensive output.

name: Plans Index
description: Tracks implementation status for plans and their sub-tasks under handbooks/plans.

name: AST Code Splitter Improvement Plan
description: Proposes replacing word-based splitting with an AST-aware code splitter while preserving the existing pipeline contract.

name: Agent Wiki Generation Backend
description: Records the Path B backend implementation for two-stage agent-driven wiki generation and its WebSocket protocol.

name: DeepWiki Agent CLI Demo
description: Records the local CLI demo used to smoke-test multi-turn agent Q&A and two-stage wiki generation.

name: Agent WebSocket Input Validation
description: Records the role-part invariant gap at the external agent WebSocket boundary and the recommended validation strategy.

name: Bash Agent Sandbox Gap
description: Records the shell execution risks introduced by the wiki-writer bash tool and the staged mitigation roadmap.

name: Repository Cache Key Collision
description: Records the cache key collision risk caused by owner-repo naming across hosts, forks, and private repositories.

name: DeepWiki RAG System Issue List
description: Records observed RAG system risks around skipped files, embedding cache provenance, validation gaps, and retrieval quality.

name: DeepWiki Improvement Directions
description: Captures prioritized improvement opportunities across RAG quality, ingestion performance, architecture, deep research, and observability.

name: RAG to Wiki Call Chain Handbook
description: Explains how repository code becomes structured wiki output through request handling, retrieval, prompting, and rendering.
